subject: Cloud Computing
title: Event Sourcing
description: A fast breakdown of Event Sourcing for builders.

hook.text: Your bank doesn't update your balance — it stores every transaction. Your balance is calculated from the history.

buildup.text: Event sourcing stores every state change as an immutable event. The current state is derived by replaying all events.

discovery.text: You get a complete audit trail for free. You can reconstruct the state at any point in time by replaying events.

twist.text: Event stores grow forever. Replaying millions of events gets slow, requiring snapshots and careful management.

climax.text: Event sourcing shines in financial systems, audit-heavy domains, and anywhere history matters as much as the present.

punchline.text: Don't overwrite state. Record what happened. Replay the truth.

quiz.question: What is a key benefit of event sourcing?
options: A complete audit trail that lets you reconstruct state at any point in time
It eliminates the need for any database storage
Events are automatically deleted after processing
